pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run the Inbeidou backend CLI.

backendCli.description: Absolute path to the existing inbeidou_cli.py backend script.

downloadDir.description: Default output directory for downloaded clipped or translated videos.

defaultAccountIds.description: Optional default publish account IDs used when no accountIds are provided.

defaultTeamIds.description: Optional default publish team IDs used when no teamIds are provided.

defaultPublishPlatform.description: Default publish platform when team IDs are used.

defaultDramaPlatform.description: Default platform used for short drama discovery.

defaultLanguage.description: Default language ID used for short drama discovery.

defaultDramaOrder.description: Default sort field used for short drama discovery.
